reasoning.typography: Inter Variable — the default SaaS choice. Competent but zero personality. Large headline works functionally but this is the stencil.
reasoning.hierarchy: Hero headline dominates adequately, but below-fold becomes generic logo soup and undifferentiated content blocks. Clear focal point on entry, then diffuses.
reasoning.distinctiveness: Swap 'Linear' for 'Notion' or 'Height' or any B2B tool and nothing changes. Dark mode + big sans headline + logo parade is the 2023 startup template. 'Purpose-built for modern teams' is interchangeable corporate speak.
reasoning.color: Disciplined black/white with minimal accent use. The restraint works — no decorative gradients or busy color. This is well-executed monochrome.
reasoning.density: Vast empty black space in hero feels intentional but wastes prime real estate. Logo strip sits in void. Not confident density — just stretched padding.
reasoning.voice: Generic SaaS IA hiding behind 'AI era' buzzwords. The structure says nothing specific about Linear's actual workflow philosophy. 'A new species of product tool' is marketing fluff, not structural voice.

winning_patterns: Restrained monochrome palette — no gradient soup or decorative noise
Hero headline is large and functionally dominant
anti_patterns: Inter Variable strikes again — typographic default with zero character
Logo parade as social proof — the cliché B2B trust signal
Vast empty black space wastes screen real estate without adding meaning
'Purpose-built for modern teams with AI workflows' — generic positioning that could describe 50 products
No structural voice — this is a template IA with buzzwords swapped in
_note: Gradient meshes, smooth scroll reveals, refined motion
